app_release_notes: v1.4.0 - Loadscope now reads Garmin .FIT files straight off your chronograph: plug the Xero in and drag the Shot_Sessions folder in, no exporting session by session. Pick which sessions belong to the ladder on a new chooser screen. Targets sent from your phone now land on the right charge and count toward the best-load call. And if you drop chronograph files before planning a ladder, Loadscope stops and helps you plan it instead of guessing.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.3.0 - Loadscope now sets your scoring weights from the distance you tested at: mean radius leads the best-load call up close, velocity SD takes over at range. Same best-load pick, pointed at where you actually shoot. Plus a yardage picker on the Measure screen and a new 'How Loadscope Scores' page in the Support menu. Your saved loads don't change unless you re-score them.
